compiled_state.title: As a developer, existing implementation-plan tests pass with the new workflow
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Audit and update existing implementation-plan test suites to accommodate the new proposal generation and agent dispatch flow.
**Why**: 6+ test files directly test implementation-plan behavior with grep-based assertions and step-count assumptions that will break after structural SKILL.md changes.
**Scope**:
- IN: test-sub-agent-guard.sh, test-implementation-plan-contracts.sh, test_implementation_plan_tdd_reviewer.py, test_implementation_plan_skill_tdd_enforcement.py, test_implementation_plan_bidirectional_tdd.py, and any other tests referencing implementation-plan step structure
- OUT: New test coverage for proposal/decision-maker behavior (covered by Stories 1-3 unit tests)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, all existing implementation-plan test suites pass with the new SKILL.md structure
- When this story is complete, grep-based assertions in test-implementation-plan-contracts.sh are updated for new section headings
- When this story is complete, test-sub-agent-guard.sh assertions for implementation-plan are verified correct
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] Must audit all 6+ test files before modifying — some may already be compatible
